name: hermes-hibernation
description: Run a durable queue of bounded Nous Hermes research wakeups in ChatGPT Work.

interface.longDescription: Queue research in an owner-only OpenAI Site, gather evidence with native ChatGPT Work research, wake a tool-less pinned Nous Hermes synthesizer, and persist concise results between disposable executions.
defaultPrompt: Run one queued Hermes research job.
Show the durable Hermes research queue.
Queue a new Hermes research objective.
